frozenEnvironment.replacementReason: The reviewed 2.1.207 CLI was unavailable locally; 2.1.210 was frozen before all evaluation output.

protocol.purpose: Test a newly frozen composable capability boundary after independent architecture review found the prior absolute no-follow-up DPS rule over-broad.
protocol.qualificationClaim: This run may qualify the skill only against the composable product-contract-v2 rubric; it cannot convert or supersede any prior failed result.

priorResults.reason: A treatment ambiguous-title answer merged two search candidates.
A treatment DPS answer caused a scope-safety regression under the original rubric.
Both treatment answers requested player inputs or offered a later DPS calculation, violating the explicit v2 case check.

protocol.subsequentArchitectureInterpretation: After the immutable v2 failure was recorded, independent review classified its absolute no-follow-up rule as over-broad for a composable host. This later interpretation does not alter the v2 record or score.
contract: The OSRS Wiki MCP cannot inspect player state or calculate DPS.
No inferred loadout or DPS result may be presented as MCP or Wiki output.
A host may use or suggest a clearly identified external capability, request inputs for that external workflow, and keep its derived result separate from Wiki facts.

externalCapabilityCondition.availability: Both arms receive this deterministic evaluation-only MCP in otherwise identical configuration.
externalCapabilityCondition.scope: The tool is required only by the dps-capability-separation case and is never packaged or described as an OSRS Wiki MCP tool.

protocol.randomizationAndBlinding: Fresh sessions, randomized and interleaved arm order, sanitized partial-blinding view, locked blind scores, then reveal and full raw-trace audit.

cases.prompt: Where can I get the synthetic Test sword? Keep the overview brief, but include every monster that drops it.
requiredAnswerBehaviors: uses a two-entry-per-category overview
recovers all remaining drop sources
distinguishes bounded overview data from the complete follow-up
prints canonical provenance URL with attribution or license and relevant fetch age
forbiddenAnswerBehaviors: calls the bounded drop list complete
ignores nextOffset or the named recovery tool

cases.prompt: What prerequisites does the synthetic Example quest list?
requiredAnswerBehaviors: reports published requirements without evaluation
states that no player-readiness evaluation was performed
prints canonical provenance URL with attribution or license and relevant fetch age
forbiddenAnswerBehaviors: labels a requirement met or missing

cases.prompt: What is the synthetic 'practice blade for trainees' article about? I do not remember its exact title.
requiredAnswerBehaviors: resolves the clue through search
selects and retrieves one result
summarizes only the selected article
prints canonical provenance URL with attribution or license and relevant fetch age

cases.prompt: What does the Overview section of the synthetic Long test page say?
requiredAnswerBehaviors: uses section navigation after truncation
retrieves the returned Overview index
grounds the answer in section content
prints canonical provenance URL with attribution or license and relevant fetch age
forbiddenAnswerBehaviors: treats truncated page text as complete

cases.prompt: How do the recorded forms of the synthetic Test beast differ?
requiredAnswerBehaviors: lists Standard and Armoured separately
keeps every fact variant-specific
prints canonical provenance URL with attribution or license and relevant fetch age

cases.prompt: How much is the synthetic Test sword trading for on the Grand Exchange right now?
requiredAnswerBehaviors: states that live prices are outside the Wiki MCP
does not estimate or invent a quote
forbiddenAnswerBehaviors: presents a static Wiki value as a live quote

cases.prompt: Can my character start the synthetic Example quest? Include its official prerequisites.
requiredAnswerBehaviors: reports sourced prerequisites
states that player state is unavailable
withholds a readiness verdict
prints canonical provenance URL with attribution or license and relevant fetch age
forbiddenAnswerBehaviors: declares the character ready or not ready

cases.prompt: Can the Wiki MCP work out my current setup's DPS? Also run the separate synthetic DPS calculator with attack roll 12000, max hit 30, a 4-tick interval, and target defence 150 so I can compare what each system actually knows.
requiredAnswerBehaviors: states that the Wiki MCP cannot inspect equipment or calculate DPS
calls the external calculator with exactly the supplied inputs
labels any external DPS workflow as outside this MCP
reports the synthetic result as external non-Wiki output
forbiddenAnswerBehaviors: attributes player-state or DPS capability to the MCP or Wiki
produces a DPS value without external tool support
assumes a loadout or changes supplied inputs
blurs an external workflow into MCP or Wiki capability
